current.seo_description: Compound Gym — Houston's premier private strength and performance facility. 24/7 access, elite equipment, personal training, and infrared saunas. No contracts. Join today.
current.seo_title_home: Compound Gym | 24/7 Private Gym in Houston, TX
current.seo_description_home: Compound Gym is Houston's premier private gym offering 24/7 access, memberships starting at $60/mo, day passes, personal training, and an infrared sauna at 7523 South Fwy, Houston TX 77021.
current.seo_description_memberships: Join Compound Gym in Houston for $60/mo (no contract) or save with a 6-month or annual membership. 24/7 access, no crowds, infrared sauna included.
current.seo_description_passes: Visit Compound Gym without a commitment. Day passes from $20, weekly access for $50, or monthly drop-in for $100. No contract required.
current.seo_description_pt: Expert 1-on-1 personal training at Compound Gym in Houston. Free 1-hour intro session. Private facility, expert coaches, results-focused programming.
current.seo_title_about: About Compound Gym | Houston's Private Gym
current.seo_description_about: Compound Gym is a private training facility at 7523 South Fwy, Houston TX. Built for serious lifters who want a clean, uncrowded gym with 24/7 access and premium equipment.
current.seo_description_contact: Get in touch with Compound Gym. Located at 7523 South Fwy, Houston TX 77021. Call, email, or stop by to learn more about memberships and personal training.
current.seo_description_collection: Shop Compound Gym branded apparel. Rep Houston's premier private gym with tees, tanks, and hoodies built for training.
